entry.title: Resetting NumberRange object and drawing number again cause dump error
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I used NumberRange reuse library in absl script.

I would like to reset NumberRange Object every year for document ID.

And the logic implemented for NumberRange Object is as following.

NumberRange.ResetRange("TEST");
var test = NumberRange.DrawNumber("TEST");

Resetting NumberRange is ok.

But, when number is drawn again after resetting, it keeps loading without saving and get dump error (post method error).

 

Is my current logic wrong or needed some additional logic?

If you have any idea or experience about that case, could you please give any advice?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Navigate from custom tile to specific section in People Profile (including custom section)
entry.content:
Dear all,

figured that things have changed it seems (probably due to the new people profile).

The link now needs to look like this: /sf/liveprofile?#section/block123456

Best regards,
Philipp

entry.title: Re: Brand New GUY
entry.content: Hi @BCanales what type of help are you looking for with https://developers.sap.com ?

entry.title: Re: Cannot select destination for live data run configura...
entry.content:
Hi @Margit_Wagner,

thank you for your reply.

I've followed all the steps of the tutorial, and double-checked before posting my question.

Yes, I've created said destination and was able to use it to add the external service in the following steps.

However, the issue remains, that the destination is not available in the run configuration editor.

On a side note: While completing later steps of the tutorial, I noticed other inconsistencies which suggest functionality of BAS has been changed, for example the CI/CD integration cannot be used from within BAS, although the CD/CI service is available, and I can configure jobs in the standard app.

CI/CD not functional in BAS

Standard CI/CD App in BTP

entry.title: Re: Creating Custom Fiori App for Manage Customer Materia...
entry.content:
Hi alespad,

It is not possible to create until now.

And, thanks for your suggestion!

entry.title: How to hide "Loading Your Story"?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Is there a way to remove the "Loading Your Story" message that appears when opening a Story?

entry.title: Purge Specific goals for users in Latest Goal management
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to understand how can we purge specific goal to a specific user. We see that in the Data Retention options, we can purge the whole goals in a specific goal templet, or all goals for a specific employee. Can we choose which goal we purge for a specific user?

Mainly asking to understand if we can do this if we will have trouble converting goal templets when we will upgrade to the 'Latest Goal Management',

 

Thank you,

Efrat

entry.title: Re: Changing Movement type in Delivery and Reverse of PGI
entry.content: Hello, after doing relevabt development I see that thre is no additional development for specifying reverse good movemöent type.

entry.title: Re: Representative Key in CDS
entry.content:
Thanks, Martin.

I'd like to know, generally if we just keep it default, don't change it.

entry.title: transaction FAGLB03 vs FAGLL03 - G/L Account Line Items (New) differences.
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

The user has posted this question.
Balance showed in transaction FAGLB03 it's no the same if we enter in the same transaction/screen in the Cumulative Balance and in the transaction FAGLL03 - G/L Account Line Items (New). I am in ECC 6.0

Please suggest.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Re: How to bring your ABAP custom code to SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi @ccontreras_sap,

here are the answers to your questions:

1.  You can also move custom tables, custom data elements, custom domains to SAP BTP. SAP BTP ABAP Environment supports the following object types: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-btp-abap-environment/abap-environment/released-abap-object-types

2. abapGit plugin is for free, you can download it here: https://eclipse.abapgit.org/updatesite/

3. currently yes

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Finding business process improvements with SAP Signavio
entry.content:
As a UX specialist in the SAP S/4HANA Regional Implementation Group, I’m privileged to work with many of our SAP S/4HANA customers. 

As a customer running SAP S/4HANA, you probably fall into one of the following categories:

  • New to SAP S/4HANA and only using SAP GUI.

  • Implemented SAP S/4HANA with some SAP Fiori exposure but not sure you are using the right apps.

  • Implemented SAP S/4HANA and you want to identify areas for improvement.

  • You are aware of new business processes only available in SAP S/4HANA, and you want to find out which SAP Fiori apps to use with these business processes.

Good news! SAP S/4HANA offers LOTS of standard functionality ‘’Out of the box’’ content, including:

  • More than 3K SAP Fiori apps
  • More than 1.5K embedded analytics apps
  • More than 125 Situation Handling templates.
  • New business models only available in SAP Fiori
  • Mix and match more than 10 classic UIs

You can see with significant standard functionality listed above, it can be easy to be unsure as to where to start.

Even more good news! There is now new and improved tooling so you can learn where to start with SAP Fiori and how to identify which business process improvements will bring you new business value.

Here we will introduce the following tools to help implement business process improvements and bring new value to your business:

  • SAP Signavio Process Navigator – find the Best Practice recommendations (SAP Fiori roles and apps) for each business process.
  • SAP Signavio Process Insights - evaluate your current usage based on industry benchmarks to find priority target areas for improvement.

SAP Signavio Process Navigator is a free service that is integrated into SAP for Me to provide access to the following:

SAP Solution Scenarios, such as Lead to Cash or Plan to Fulfil; respective Solution Processes; contextual process information such as integrations, applications, and implemented solution capabilities.

SAP Signavio Process Navigator provides flow diagrams for solution values and solution processes with the following:

  • Detailed solution activities
  • Test scripts (these include which SAP Fiori apps and roles to use with each business process)
  • Setup instructions
  • Localization-specific implementation details
  • Required solution components.
  • Other implementation information

All this helps YOU to achieve tangible value as quickly as possible. Information available in SAP Signavio Process Navigator is structured in line with SAP's Enterprise Architecture methodology providing you with a consumer-grade experience with a modern and intuitive user interface (UI).

You can use the SAP Signavio Process Navigator to assist you in your scoping.  SAP Process Signavio Navigator contains process diagrams and test scripts per Line of Business function that will help you understand:

  • Which SAP Business Roles are relevant to your business processes
  • Which SAP Fiori apps and classic UIs are recommended for your SAP S/4HANA release

Each solution process has a test script with details on BOTH the SAP Fiori roles to use and an overview table of recommended SAP Fiori apps associated with the solution process.

Using SAP Signavio Process Navigator,  YOU can easily find this information as follows, here we will use the Solution Process Accounts Payable (J60) as an example:

  1. Logon to SAP Signavio Process Navigator and click on the Solution Scenarios tile:

  2. Locate the Solution Scenario for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (Note: This Solution Scenario can  also be used for SAP S/4HANA on-Premise)

  3. Follow the menu path shown Finance->Financial Operations->Accounts Payable (J60). Select the Accounts Payable (J60) link:

  4. From the Accelerators tab, click on the test script and this will download a document (in this case called J60_S4HANA2023_BPD_EN_DE.docx) to your downloads folder

  5. Open the document downloaded in step 4 and view the Table of Contents. Here we can see the following:

    • Roles that contain the SAP Fiori apps for this business process (section 2.2 in this case)
    • An Overview Table of the SAP Fiori apps for this business process (section 3 in this case)

  6. Here in section 2.2, we can see a full list of the roles that contain the SAP Fiori apps for this business process: [Note: Role SAP_BR_AP_ACCOUNTANT is noted here, this will be used in the example in step 8].

  7. Here in section 3, we can see a full list of the roles that contain the SAP Fiori apps for this business process. [Note: SAP Fiori app F1861 Display Supplier List is noted here, this will be used in the example in step 8].

     

  8. With this information, you can review the SAP Fiori app details in the SAP Fiori apps reference library which can be found here: https://url.sap/fiori-apps-library

    The SAP Fiori apps reference library contains detailed information on all SAP Fiori launchpad content for SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud including:

    • SAP Fiori apps
    • Classic Web Dynpro apps
    • Web Client UI
    • Classic SAP GUI transactions

    Based on what you found in the SAP Signavio Process Navigator in step 6 and step 7, proceed as follows using the SAP Fiori apps reference library to search by Role or SAP Fiori App ID.

          a) Search by role: All apps for SAP S/4HANA -> by Roles-> SAP_BR_AP_ACCOUNTANT

           b) Search by SAP Fiori App ID: All apps for SAP S/4HANA ->F1861

NOTE: In some cases you can even view the relevant SAP Fiori apps from the Business Process Model (BPM diagram so you do not even need to look at the test script, this make it VERY EASY to find the SAP Fiori Apps. For example, in SAP Signavio Process Navigator / Solution Scenario / SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you can see directly from the BPM diagram in Solution Process Basic Credit Management (BD6) that SAP Fiori App ID F4596 is used:

 

Conclusion: You now have enough information to plan for and implement the SAP Fiori apps that will bring business process improvements.

SAP Signavio Process Insights is a process analytics solution that helps YOU rapidly discover areas for improvement and automation within your SAP business processes.

What can I achieve with the product?

  • Get a better understanding of your processes.
  • Find the root cause of your problems.
  • Obtain faster value discovery pre-, mid-, or post-transformation.
  • Increase process transparency and process standardization.
  • Reduce transformation time and risks.
  • Start exploring with SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition (see below):

 

  • SAP Signavio Process Insights is the fastest path to process improvements.
  • The SAP Signavio Process Insights solution is a process analytics solution that helps you rapidly discover areas for improvement and automation.

SAP Signavio Process Insights helps you understand your current business process performance and identify new functionalities from SAP S/4HANA, SAP Fiori apps, automation, and intelligent technologies to support your business goals, including:

  • Unique tailored insights into your current operational business process performance, based on data from your SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA system.
  • Specific insights and recommendations are segmented by line of business and end-to-end processes
  • More functionalities, automation, intelligent technologies, SAP Fiori apps and all the SAP cloud solutions with SAP S/4HANA
  • Build your case for SAP S/4HANA in SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition and secure the buy-in from the business

Refer to SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition now in General Availability!

For release dates for SAP Signavio Process Insights refer to SAP Note 3399700 SAP Signavio Process Insights - Planned Release Dates

Becoming an SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA guru

You’ll find much more on the community topic page for SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

Other helpful links in the SAP Community:

  • Follow our tag SAP S/4HANA RIG for more from the SAP S/4HANA Customer Care and RIG
  • See all questions and answers about SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA
  • Follow SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA for more blogs and updates
  • Ask a Question about SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

Brought to you by the SAP S/4HANA Customer Care and RIG.

entry.title: Collaborate Like Never Before: Introducing the Collaborative Draft Feature in SAP Fiori
entry.content:
In the fast-paced world of business, efficient teamwork is the key to success. However, when it comes to collaborative work within SAP systems, many of us have faced challenges. But that's about to change with the 2402 release of SAP Fiori! 🌟

Collaborative Draft Feature: A Gamechanger

Demo of the Collaborative Draft Feature

Imagine working on a complex sales order with your team, each member bringing their expertise to the table. Previously, simultaneous collaboration within SAP was a tough nut to crack. But with the new Collaborative Draft Feature, this process becomes seamless and efficient. Just like in Microsoft Word or Google Docs, multiple users can now work on a document at the same time.

How Does It Work?

  1. Draft Mode: In applications supporting Draft Mode, multiple users can collaborate on a single object simultaneously.
  2. Invitation: Want to collaborate with a specific colleague? Simply invite them via a dialog box within the application.
  3. Live Synchronization: Changes are synchronized in real-time. When one user edits a field, it is locked for others to prevent overwriting, ensuring a smooth and conflict-free workflow.

Why This Matters

We at Futurisma believe this feature is a significant advancement for SAP users. Complex applications, such as Manage Sales Orders, will benefit immensely. Sales teams can now update and manage customer orders together, in real-time, without the usual back-and-forth and potential for errors.

🚀 Boosting Efficiency and Teamwork

This feature doesn’t just enhance efficiency within SAP; it also promotes collaborative work across the organization. Teams can work together more intuitively, leveraging each other’s strengths and insights immediately. This not only improves productivity but also fosters a more collaborative and innovative work environment.

Looking Ahead

The Collaborative Draft Feature is set to revolutionize how teams interact within SAP. It's a step towards making SAP applications as user-friendly and collaborative as other leading tools in the market.

Are you as excited about this feature as we are?

entry.title: Re: How to post CSRF Token to SAP Standard ODATA to perfo...
entry.content:
Prathamesh,
415 is unsupported media type error. In your postman call, check the Content-Type header, and set the same header in CPI before the API call.

BR,

Raihan

entry.title: SAP Quality and Production Differences

Dear Friends

Reports S_PL0_86000030 and S_PL0_86000028 are showing correct balances in quality, whereas in Production, they are showing different balances . I am in ECC 6.0

Please suggest.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP, ABAP in the Cloud Custom Code Transformation using abapGit and gCTS
entry.content: @Tóffuli I think this is something to do with your connectivity on Eclipse to the BTP environment. Please try using the service key option for the login.

entry.title: Rectangular data matrix in Adobe livecycle designer
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

please, is there a way to insert a rectangular data matrix into form in adobe livecycle designer?

We did not find an option to add this type of barcode component in the list of barcodes that adobe livecycle designer offers (see picture). 

Even though there are options to add data matrix, none of them were rectangular. One question thread suggested to change the moduleWidth and moduleHeight (XML properties of the data matrix) to make it rectangular, but doing so doesn't do anything. 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Consume an On-Premise HTTP service from ABAP in the Cloud (Scenario : SOAP Service)
entry.content: @Orsolya probably too late, but this is the HTTP destination you create on BTP to your on-premise system.

entry.title: I wanted to add a custom field in "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" in Fiori APP.
entry.content:
I wanted to add a custom field in "Manage Sales Contract Version 2" in Fiori Launchpad.

In "Custom Fileds" under This Custom Field  in the "UIs and Reports" Tab I see a lot of apps where I can enable this it for example:

- Manage Sales Order 

- Manage Sales Order V2

- Manage Sales Contract 

But it does not show "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" 

how can I solve this issue as I want want to enable it in "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" App?

entry.title: Re: Question about how to post odata api using build apps
entry.content: You tagged your questions with "SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database", but there is no HANA db anywhere directly involved in your scenario. I would suggest removing this tag and instead adding SAP S/4HANA tag to make it properly discoverable.

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
Hi @manuel_gonzaga,

this is a generic error message. Could you please provide more details about which failures appear in your case?

Thanks and Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: How can we have the all options in the Fiori App MM12?
entry.content:
Dear all

I face a problem.

The options under MM12 in the APP Fiori are not available.

When I want to paste a list of material to implemented the date change in MM12 under Fiori app, I don't have the option. The sytem only let me to paste material one by one.

Is there an action to do to have the same behaviour as on the MM12? Do we have an app that permite to schedule the change in the material master in mass mode?

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: Trading Partner in Asset Master
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

in the fixed asset master there is the field trading partner.
Am I right in assuming that this field is purely informative and that there is no inheritance in the posting document?

Thanks for your support

BR Jan

entry.title: Re: LOA - Manager not updated
entry.content:
Hi Sruthi,

our customers are managing this manually by take action.

In addition, if there is org changes for example, they are taking action, enter position to propagate all changes to Job Info and before saving they are removing position to keep employee unassigned from position.

As there is R2R there is no direct connection between position and employee.

BR, lukas.

entry.title: Error in Flexible Workflow for PR
entry.content:
Hi, Experts

I maintained a PR Flexible workflow settings and set agent determination as Manager of Workflow Initiator,
but after save PR document, the following message appeared. Appreciate for any advice:
 - Recipient role with id 'superiorOfWorkflowInitiator' cannot be resolved

What I have done in system(S/4HANA 2022 ON PREMISE  FPS(02/2023)  
1. create Flexible workflow, set agent determination as Manager of Last Approver.(Reference  *1.)
2. maintain employee and approver's Organizational Structure(Reference  *2.)
3. maintain manager' role
4. Create PR through Tr-code:ME51N

*1 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/af9ef57f504840d2b81be8667206d485/91ab576eaf58475f8934d2dcef16edb3-612.html
*2 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4cef93946a0b48ec89533b3c34443b85/017b7d3ea4c04710ba802b6bf454c230.html

entry.title: Re: Advanced Styling and Customization in SAP ABAP ALV using CL_SALV_TABLE
entry.content: nice content

entry.title: Power designer column font color
entry.content:
Hi Team 

How to retrieve the  the current font and font color for each columns table using VBA .  I know the display is associated with symbol. At column level font is associated with sub-object format. To update the fonts I can see the below example as given below 

https://powerdesigning.com/2011/04/13/subobjects/

but how i retrieve the current  the font and color of the column . I could not see any properties for font and font color a column level . Can you help 

Thanks a lot 

Ani

entry.title: Re: SAP IDM 8 Succesfactors integration
entry.content:
Hello Bob,

I would like to inform you that our SuccessFactors connector already supports mTLS as an authentication method. You can check the following SAP Note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3468612.

Best,
Martin

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content:
Hi @anandsun6415 

Please kindly refer to SAP Note No.3459968 - Electronic Invoice Processing for Malaysia: Pre-Implementation Guidance.

You may refer to the SAP DRC cloud edition - SAP’s go-to solution to support electronic documents and statutory reporting requirements globally is SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (cloud edition) This would be the strategic choice to support electronic invoicing in Malaysia too.

Thank you

entry.title: why cant I use BASE while declaring table inline?
entry.content:
hello experts,

here lt_schdx will only have only line because every time a new line is added, old ones are removed.
if I had table declared beforehand I could use BASE but it's not allowed here.
any alternative because BASE statement is not allowed, my code below:

LOOP AT lt_item ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_item>).

DATA(lt_schdx) =
VALUE cod_t_bapischdlx( ( updateflag = 'I'
          itm_number = COND #( WHEN <ls_item>-posnr IS NOT INITIAL THEN 'X' )
          sched_line = '0001'
          req_date   = COND #( WHEN <ls_item>-edatu IS NOT INITIAL THEN 'X' )
          date_type  = 'X'
          req_qty    = 'X' ) ).

ENDLOOP.

entry.title: zodstm difference
entry.content:
Hello,

We have some difference stock in T-CODE ZODSTM PE1 bettwen SAP and LSP partner system.Is there any way we can clear this difference ?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Microsoft Teams Integration with SuccessFactors - New 'Home' tab in the SuccessFactors App
entry.content:
Hi,

we have just set up the Microsoft 365 integration into SF production with the new app from the App Store and the Outlook and Teams integration for recruiting interview scheduling. The new HOME tab in Teams is currently missing. What do we have to do to get it shown to us? Is it perhaps not available yet?

Best Regards
Wiebke

entry.title: Re: How to Retrieve Key Performance Metrics from SAP ASE...
entry.content:
Hey, @Mark_A_Parsons, Thankyou for your response. In our architecture, we utilize a Python script leveraging the PyODBC library to extract server, processing, and network statistics from monitoring tables(https://infocenter.sybase.com/help/topic/com.sybase.infocenter.dc36274.1600/doc/html/san1393052495228.html). Utilizing procedures like sp_monitorconfig is not feasible with this python script to fetch the necessary data. Therefore, we are forced to fetch the required information directly from the system monitoring tables in Sybase. And hence the question remains the same, we need to fetch the above mention data points directly from the Sybase Monitoring tables, by strictly using this python script. So, can you provide me an solution to this problem without changing our python architecture?

Required data points:

  1. Percent of lock used
  2. Percent of active connections
  3. Heap Memory Utilization %
  4. Memory Utilization %
  5. Disk Utilization % by Logical Disk

entry.title: Re: How can we have the all options in the Fiori App MM12?
entry.content:
Hi,

MM12 is also used for single material change.

have you try this fiori app?

Mass Maintenance for Master Data

Regards

entry.title: Re: Efficiency in development: Test Data in development client
entry.content:
@Ryan-Crosby Thanks for sharing your experience about the golden client, it underlines my assumption about it.

@Sandra_Rossi: Thanks! We asked already multiple times to copy data from QUAL or PROD to DEV, but it is being put off with "DEV is not sized for it" and "PROD import to DEV will make DEV crash because of customizing differences, leading to an inconsistent client". Have you faced the latter too, and if yes, how have you overcome it?

@christoph_weyd Thanks, but I think another system will be even harder to argument for.

entry.title: Re: IPS Rea Job Failing (userId is not available in content)
entry.content: Hello, did you find any solution for this?

entry.title: S4 Public cloud - QM on production order (type 03) - Possibility for ad hoc creation
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Is there any possibility of how to have active control without automatic creation?

At this moment the client has more than 600 production orders per day, but they need an inspection lot only for a few of them. At this moment we found these possibilities

1. active control 03 on product - there will be 600 inspection lots per day, from which we use only 10 of them

2. turn off the control on the product - to create insp. lot we need to change it in MM02. Without active control, you can't create an inspection lot with a connection to the production order

 

I found some settings in implementation activities but I'm not sure about the limits of the public cloud.

entry.title: Re: Microsoft Teams Integration with SuccessFactors - New 'Home' tab in the SuccessFactors App
entry.content: @WSandmann There has been a slight delay in publishing/updating the app to the app store. It should be available by the end of May. There are no additional configuration needed.

entry.title: Re: Suggestion requried for Game development using Python
entry.content: It's great to hear about your enthusiasm for game development with Python! Since you have completed your Python programming training, you have a solid foundation to start with. For game development, I recommend exploring libraries like Pygame, which is excellent for 2D games and has a supportive community. Another option is Godot, which, while it uses its own scripting language (GDScript), also supports Python. As you delve into this, check out resources like online tutorials, forums, and documentation to enhance your learning. Also, if you’re looking for inspiration or just want to experience high-quality gameplay, consider installing and playing Traffic Rider on your Mac. It’s a well-crafted game that can give you insight into smooth graphics, user engagement, and game mechanics that you might want to incorporate into your own projects. Happy coding!

entry.title: Re: EC Time Off workbooks
entry.content:
Hello Harisha,

please try to use this link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL/98e1ecaba5ad46948e133cf095e1c77a/de59ca96f84549298a87ab7467e8be0b.html?locale=en-US

If it won't work, go to here:

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central | SAP Help Portal

Scroll down to section: Best Practices for HCM

Open link and go to Download. In header select Localization you wish to have (United states for example)  and expand Download on left navigation panel. Select country and scroll down. You should see TIME OFF link there.

Attaching screenshot. Hope it will help you.

BR, Lukas.

entry.title: Re: MDG - S/4 Customizing synchronization
entry.content: Hi, I checked the link in the reply below. This is helpful in itself. I have just been told that this object list is not sufficient, as the cluster objects must be considered. Was this also the case for you and if so, did you receive a corresponding list?

entry.title: Re: Hana express downloader Options not showing
entry.content:
@Vitaliy-Rthe OP is "geo-locked out", but when I tried the same from ES, US-ny and West Europe -- no download options at all.

Do you have any idea what's going on? Apparently on SAP side a bigger IP block has been banned.

a similar complaint related to network settings, leaving here for reference - Issue on downloading HANA Xe (GitHub)

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Trend Calculation for KPI in Analytical CDS View
entry.content:
Due to the lack of a more elegant solution, I now solved this problem by creating my own cds views for calculating a trend reference value.

I use the following steps:

  1. Select all fields that are relevant for trend calculation in the Fact View 
  2. Use a Table Function to only include rows within the last X days via SQL Script
  3. Aggregate all rows into a single line using SUM( ) functions
  4. Calculate the average values (e.g. "NrOfDelivAsCommitedItems / TotalNrOfItems")  
  5. Cross Join with the original data, so that each row includes the average value in the Cube View

It is not an elegant solution, but it allows me to use the dynamically calculated reference value in the KPI:

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - dynamic Average
entry.content: Hello William, the solution works, but I cannot write data to the period '000000". The following error occurs: "Date member '000000' not found' . I have currently written the data to the period 202312. At the end, I delete the data from the period.how can I use the period '000000' in the data action?

entry.title: Re: Identity and Authentication Management in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi @GSsap ,

We are trying to enable the SSO for in our environment and it seems to worked a bit as we got onto to the login screen along with Microsoft authenticator verify with an 2 digit number on mobile app. But thereafter, it would pop up with the message:

"Unexpected error when authenticating with identity provider"

I have tried searching for SAP note but it could find anything. Also on the Azure ID, we checked the logs and connection request seems to be successful. Furthermore, now as I mistakenly logged out of the SLD and when trying to login back it takes me to same SSO process and gives the unexpected error so I am not even able to disable the SSO from SLD.

Any guidance? Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Develop CAP Project with Lazyvim in Docker
entry.content:
How to add to cds-lsp to already existing Nvim setup:

 

local parser_config = require('nvim-treesitter.parsers').get_parser_configs()
parser_config.cds = {
  install_info = {
    -- local path or git repo
    -- url = '/path/to/tree-sitter-cds',
    url = 'https://github.com/cap-js-community/tree-sitter-cds.git',
    files = { 'src/parser.c', 'src/scanner.c' },
    branch = 'main',
    generate_requires_npm = false,
    requires_generate_from_grammar = false,
  },
  filetype = 'cds',
  used_by = { 'cdl', 'hdbcds' },
}

vim.api.nvim_create_autocmd({ 'BufRead', 'BufNewFile' }, {
  pattern = { '*.cds' },
  command = 'set filetype=cds',
})
require('lspconfig').cds_lsp.setup {}

 

as well run the following vim commands:

 

TSInstall cds
LspInstall cds-lsp or MasonInstall cds-lsp

entry.title: RAP - Create mandatory fields Popup
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I have a managed RAP app and when I mark fields as mandatory, a popup with exactly these fields opens when I create it. After the popup, I get to the object page as usual and can enter the other fields.

Can I switch off this pop-up? I think it only came with oData V4.
It would be even better if I could influence which mandatory fields are in this popup and which are not. The reason is, I have several mandatory fields but they are all split across different sections in the object page. It would only be important to enter the first two via the popup right from the start.

For Example:

I have marked several fields as mandatory, but only the first two are used in the popup.

regards 

Lars

entry.title: Re: Not able to release Production order
entry.content: Hello Ashish, Can you please share error you are getting while you are releasing production order. Regards

entry.title: PLM Myths vs. Truths - What do you know?
entry.content:
PLM? Detectives? Who would’ve thought those two words would go so well together. Speaking of a good pair, our dynamic duo and part-time PLM Detectives Yash and Sarah have an interesting series cooking up. As they adorn their detective hats, they’re hosting a game show for the decoding of SAP Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) myths and truths. Our energetic duo, Yash and Sarah, present thought-provoking myths, and truths to our panel of SAP PLM experts. With Ulf Petzel, Eudes Canuto, Andreas Madlencnik, Carsten Dietze-Selent, and Stefan Ziegler, our SAP PLM detectives are not only able to debunk myths but emphasis truths of the power of PLM. The best part about this series is that you have a front row seat to all the action!

The first episode comes fresh off the press ushering in insightful perspectives on the statement that PLM is "only for large enterprises". Our panel of experts begin their answers with a slight chuckle as they immediately know it is a myth. Some might even say a double myth. Intriguing, isn't it? Companies of all sizes can have challenges in product development and that is exactly where SAP PLM comes in.

 

As episode two in unveiled, the PLM detectives approach a tough statement. "Organizations can simply buy PLM and use it out-of-the-box". Is it a myth or truth? Well, according to our experts, it is a bit tricky. It can be the case to a certain extent; however, this is in fact a myth. SAP PLM is not a one size fits all solution because needs vary from customer to customer. SAP provides the option to tailor software specifically to the needs of the business. Sounds like a win-win to me.

The third episode’s suspenseful question definitely raised my eyebrows. “PLM can enable effective maintenance and asset management.” Luckily our expert panel knows the exact right answer. PLM has an impact on effective maintenance and asset management making this statement… *drumroll* true!

Episode four is in a league of its own as it takes a widespread assumption head-on - "PLM enhances supply chain visibility and efficiency". Our panel of experts did not show any sign hesitation as they acclaimed this statement to be undoubtably true. Thinking about the supply chain process, PLM is there to support in the sourcing process from helping customers to share product data, share requirements, get feedback and to control the entire process. SAP PLM is there to support from the very birth of a product supporting the complete digital supply chain. Exciting, right?

Brace yourselves as episode five confronts the debatable assumption that "PLM is just a digital filing cabinet and can compromise data security". Our experts emphasize PLM’s document management capabilities, however, that is not all. PLM not only stores data of products from different authoring systems, but it also extends to business processes such as: workflows, managing product structures, change management, manufacturing handover, drives compliance, and many more processes. SAP PLM's function goes beyond mere data storage and with the right implementation, data is secure and not compromised. After watching our experts debunk this myth, it all just makes sense!

We shake things up further in episode six, deconstructing the widely accepted misconception - "PLM is only for product design and manufacturing". Not to be mistaken, PLM does support product design and manufacturing, but SAP PLM also supports process industries with specification management, formulation development and compliance checks. Product Lifecycle Management reaches across every area of an organization involved with products from procurement to marketing, and even sales. The versatility of implementation areas of SAP PLM is showcased by challenging the conventional. Are you ready for the unexpected?

In episode seven, our cunning PLM detectives seek out to understand if the next statement is a myth or truth - "PLM is really just for physical products (product-based industries)". Our experts elucidate the far-reaching applicability of PLM, proving its not restricted to just physical products but can be used in various industries, including those producing physical goods such as software, data, etc. Our experts also bring in the history of PLM to answer this inquiry from our detectives, it’s intriguing how history can define a starting point but also highlight the innovations made along the journey, wouldn’t you agree?

Finally, episode eight ends our detectives’ journey on a piping hot topic - "PLM can help ensure regulatory compliance". Our experts emphasize SAP PLM's crucial role in sustaining regulatory compliance in the modern globalized world. PLM takes over this role as one of the most important aspects of PLM implementation is to comply with the regulations of specific locations, for example countries, otherwise products cannot be introduced into the market.  Did someone order a hot topic with a twist?

I recommend you take the leap and view our unique series that will not only spark your curiosity into the comprehensive world of SAP PLM, but you will get to know other sides of PLM that you might not have thought about before. Our detectives Yash and Sarah really took us on a detective journey and when you take a look at the series, I am sure you will have the same outcome as I did – knowing way more than what I started the series with. From squashing myths and emphasizing truths about SAP PLM our panel of experts really share their expertise and wisdom in the world of SAP Product Lifecycle Management.

Are you planning to check out the video series? After viewing, write one new thing you learned in the comment section below. I am definitely looking forward to your key takeaways!

entry.title: Are SAP ASE and IQ On Premise maintained?

entry.title: SAP Companion for Enable Now Manager - Not displaying in Learner View
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm seeing unexpected behaviour in the Learner View of Enable Now Manager whereby SAP Companion doesn't initialise for learner accounts. It loads and displays content for administrator accounts without any problems.

SAP Companion initiates and displays content for learner accounts on the Enable Now Manager homepage. I've ensured that the help-editor=false parameter has been added to the Companion configuration, I've also double checked to see what happens if the learner permission is set to also show unpublished content for the workarea that hosts the SAP Companion content, but it doesn't make any difference. 

Any idea would be gratefully received.

Many thanks,

Andrew

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - dynamic Average
entry.content: Hi William, I found the setting booking for period '000000". (Booking Behavior) Thank you

entry.title: Re: Stock determination in outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

It is based on the strategy. You can prioritize the storage location priority in the strategy you have made. When you create the delivery the system will check and run the strategy at the time of Post Goods Issue. There are other things you have to check let's say what batch determination strategy you are using FEFO, etc.

 

Hope this will resolve your issue.

 

Regards,

Jahangir

entry.title: Re: Stock determination in outbound delivery
entry.content: Also maintain the Stock Determination Group in MRP2 View of the Material Master which you have created above. It'll not function properly without that.

entry.title: SAP Personas script short help
entry.content:
Hi. 

I am currently learning to use FM in scripts, and I cannot go past the problem:

I am fetching data from FM and it comes back when I put it in the message. That's ok.

 

But when putting this result into a text field, I receive this message

 

 

 

var material = session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/subPersonas_171517773671885/txtPersonas_171628553481856").text;
var plant = "5590"

var oRFC = session.createRFC("BAPI_MATERIAL_STOCK_REQ_LIST");
oRFC.setParameter("MATERIAL", material);
oRFC.setParameter("PLANT", plant);
oRFC.requestResults(["MRP_STOCK_DETAIL","RETURN"]);
oRFC.send();

var _ADDRESS = oRFC.getResultObject("MRP_STOCK_DETAIL");
var _RETURN = oRFC.getResultObject("RETURN");


session.utils.alert(_ADDRESS.UNRESTRICTED_STCK);

var test = _ADDRESS.UNRESTRICTED_STCK;

session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/subPersonas_171517773671885/txtPersonas_171620992281151").text = test;

 

 

 

Also, can please someone help me write a script for fetching data directly from the table?

I tried and tried, but couldn't succeed. Hours have pasted and I don't know how to approach this. Already searched the internet, but no success.

For example, I would use FM "RFC_READ_TABLE" to read MARD table with filter material and plant, and receive back one field "VMINS".

entry.title: Optimized Story Experience - GetResultSet after setfreshpaused(false) doesnt work anymore
entry.content:
Hi experts,

after converting my old classic analytic application to new Story OSE the following code doesnt work anymore.

Table_1.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(false);
var membersRes = Table_1.getDataSource().getResultSet({"006EIDM3RWZJKVLQMDKLWU6MG":"39217857-8320-4345-9347-722179101763"});
console.log(memberRes);


var "memberRes" is now undefined. It seems the code now doesnt wait for the Table to be loaded. How can I fix that?

Partner on click of save. How to achieve this.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA - ODATA API's - is it time for a "Safety Belt" ?
entry.content:
I would never expose  S/4 Odata Web service directly to third-paties.

The protection I suggest is to use an API Management system , from SAP, Microsoft or others, to intermediate the request. In API Management I would introduce consumption quotas in order to limit the amout of data that can any third party could bring from the S/4 OData API in one single call.

entry.title: Re: Water in plant
entry.content:
In your plant, water is used to cool the FG material, and some of it evaporates, making it hard to measure exactly how much is used. This water is not added directly to the BOM. Instead, you can track it as an indirect material cost in your system.

To configure this, you can set up a utility cost center to account for the water usage and then allocate these costs to your production orders. For accurate tracking and cost control, using tools like the olansi water purifier can help manage water quality and usage. This way, the cost of water gets added to the final product cost indirectly.

entry.title: Re: Extending the ABAP CDS extractor

entry.title: Re: How to get memory utilization schema wise

entry.title: Re: How to get memory utilization schema wise
entry.content: Hi when i open the link it says You do not have sufficient privileges to access this knowledge item

entry.title: How to configure DVM?
entry.content:
We would like to understand, how to properly configure DVM on our system. Also, are there any expected performance issue to activate it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to configure DVM?
entry.content:
Firstly, the managed system configuration should be completed for the relevant managed system, in particular step 3 (RFC Users), step 5 (DBACockpit Connection) and in step 7, the 'Extractors Setup' activity should be performed successfully. 

DVM can then be configured in SOLMAN_SETUP, in the Data Volume Management scenario.
Each step contains a Help Text section at the top of the page which provides detailed information on completing the step. 

Once the configuration is completed, analysis can be performed via the tiles available in the DVM workcenter group in transaction SM_WORKCENTER. 

Please visit the Data Volume Management Topic Page on SAP Community to access further resources and documents on using DVM, including a User Guide for DVM. 

With regard to performance - you should not experience any performance issues with activating DVM, as the configuration mainly involves activating the DVM infrastructure on your systems. As you create DVM analyses, you may need to consider the size of the tables to be analyzed if you face any performance issues. There is a Data Management Guide which provides useful information on this.

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between Length, Decimal Places...
entry.content: Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Issue with Creating Service Consumption Model for Outbound Service using OData V4 API
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

When attempting to upload the API specification (EDMX file) while creating the service consumption model, we encounter the following error:
Error while parsing an XML stream: 'failed to change codepage'.
This issue occurs exclusively with APIs of OData V4 type. In contrast, the service consumption model creation works without issues for APIs of OData V2 type.

Detailed Error Context:

Tutorial Followed:  https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-partner-outbound-call.html 
API Used: Standard Bank API of S/4HANA public cloud version ( Bank API outbound)
Error Message: Error while parsing an XML stream: 'failed to change codepage'
OData Version: Issue specifically with OData V4 type; no issues with OData V2 type.

Steps to Reproduce:

Follow the steps in the tutorial to create a service consumption model.
Upload the OData V4 API specification (EDMX file).
Encounter the error during the upload process.

Request your assistance on this.

entry.title: Re: How to get memory utilization schema wise
entry.content:
Hi SachinBG

Please check below solution:

  • The HANA Peak Memory Utilization can be viewed in HANA Studio. Please see Peak Used Memory in the Overview Tab of HANA Studio
  • HANA Licensed Memory details can also be viewed in HANA Studio. Go to HANA Studio --> Properties --> License --> System License
  • Please see Note 1704499 - System Measurement for License Audit regarding Export System Measurement

Please see the sql script collection attached to
1969700 - SQL Statement Collection for SAP HANA

For example
HANA_Tables_DiskSize_2.00.060+
HANA_Tables_LargestTables_2.00.040+
HANA_Tables_TopGrowingTables_Size_History_2.00.060+

Can be edited in their "modification section" to specify the particular schema or timeframe you want to examine.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support
